    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    GroupablePoint
    Amazingco GroupablePoints system.
    IdentificationRegistry
    Interface for managing package pickup registrations in the Amazingco system.
    Kiosk
    Amazingco Kiosk system.
    Package
    Package entity used by Amazingco systems.
    PackageLocker
    PackageLocker management system for Amazingco.
    PickingPoint
    Picking point abstraction for Amazingco systems.
    PickingPointHub
    PickingPointHub for Amazingco systems.
    PickingPointsSystem
    Management system for Amazingco picking points.
    PostOffice
    Post office pickup point for Amazingco systems.
